# 2021-05 add committee

In addition to the community inbox, a separate committee was added in 2021-05 with the intention of enacting faster actions and lowering the burden on the community to vote on all changes.

See [related script](/scripts/2021-05-committee.js) on how this change was enacted on the DAO.

## Script output

```
Planning modifications to the Decentraland DAO on network mainnet:
  Install DAO committee and associated delay mechanism

This organization will be targetted:
  - Url:                   https://mainnet.aragon.org/#/0xf47917b108ca4b820ccea2587546fbb9f7564b56
  - Kernel:                0xf47917b108ca4b820ccea2587546fbb9f7564b56
  - ACL:                   0xbc1e81dae1c52115c40764c882233329b1405e0b
  - SAB Voting:            0x41e83d829459f99bf4ee2e26d0d79748fb16b94f
  - SAB Token Manager:     0xb43504e5381ec9941cead3d74377cb63cba3b901
  - Community Voting:      0x2aa9074caa11e30838caf681d34b981ffd025a8b
  - Agent                  0x9a6ebe7e2a7722f8200d0ffb63a1f6406a0d7dce
  - Catalyst               0x4a2f10076101650f40342885b99b6b101d83c486
  - POI List               0x0ef15a1c7a49429a36cb46d4da8c53119242b54e
  - Name List              0x0c4c90a4f29872a2e9ef4c4be3d419792bca9a36

And planning these changes as steps:
  1. New token
    - Install new Token Manager (at 0xDf73655Add1c8277e7de29373B2ED8020D24a2a8) controlling token at 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
    - With initial membership of:
      - 0x3323B7264F7D5e8f98e6aFCcec73b6bA1116AE19
      - 0xfe91C0c482E09600f2d1DBCA10FD705BC6de60bc
      - 0xBef99f5f55CF7cDb3a70998C57061B7e1386a9b0
    - Setting permissions:
      + CommitteeTokenManager:MINT_TOKENS    => Community Voting <> SAB Voting
      + CommitteeTokenManager:BURN_TOKENS    => Community Voting <> SAB Voting
  2. Delay mechanism
    - Install new Delay (at 0x568eCF5EE9f9273143560a046c3E4F43e8666721) with 24hr period
    - Setting permissions:
      + CommitteeDelay:SET_DELAY_ROLE        => SAB Voting <> SAB Voting
      + CommitteeDelay:DELAY_EXECUTION_ROLE  => CommitteeTokenManager <> SAB Voting
      + CommitteeDelay:PAUSE_EXECUTION_ROLE  => [SAB Voting, CommitteeTokenManager] <> SAB Voting
      + CommitteeDelay:RESUME_EXECUTION_ROLE => SAB Voting <> SAB Voting
      + CommitteeDelay:CANCEL_EXECUTION_ROLE => SAB Voting <> SAB Voting
    - And being granted permissions:
      + Agent:EXECUTE_ACTIONS
      + Agent:RUN_SCRIPT_ROLE
      + Catalyst:MODIFY_ROLE
      + PoiList:ADD_ROLE
      + PoiList:REMOVE_ROLE
      + NameList:ADD_ROLE
      + NameList:REMOVE_ROLE

============================================================

Deploy and configure Committee Token Manager
  Raw data to create a vote through SAB Token Manager:
    

  Send as raw transaction with:
    { "to": "0xb43504e5381ec9941cead3d74377cb63cba3b901", "data": "" })

Deploy and configure Committee Delay
  Raw data to create a vote through SAB Token Manager:
    

  Send as raw transaction with:
    { "to": "0xb43504e5381ec9941cead3d74377cb63cba3b901", "data": "
```
